hindi: जय बगलामुखी देवी पीत। शत्रु स्तंभन की शक्ति जीत॥
english: Victory to the yellow-clad Bagalamukhi Devi; victorious power of paralyzing enemies
roman: Jai Bagalamukhi Devi Peet, Shatru Stambhan Ki Shakti Jeet

hindi: दश महाविद्या में बगलामुखी। शत्रु नाशक शक्ति बड़ी सुखी॥
english: Bagalamukhi among the ten Mahavidyas; the great enemy-destroying power, greatly blessed
roman: Dash Mahavidya Mein Bagalamukhi, Shatru Nashak Shakti Badi Sukhi

hindi: पीत वस्त्र और पीत आसन। हल्दी चढ़ती तुम्हें प्रसन्न॥
english: Yellow garments and yellow seat; turmeric offerings please you
roman: Peet Vastra Aur Peet Aasan, Haldi Chadhti Tumhen Prasann

hindi: वाद विवाद में विजय दिलाती। न्यायालय में भी साथ निभाती॥
english: She grants victory in arguments and debates; she also supports in courts of law
roman: Vaad Vivaad Mein Vijay Dilati, Nyayalay Mein Bhi Saath Nibhati

hindi: स्तंभन मारण मोहन शक्ति। षट्कर्म सिद्धि है तेरी भक्ति॥
english: Powers of paralysis, killing, enchantment; the six acts are perfected through devotion to you
roman: Stambhan Maran Mohan Shakti, Shatkarm Siddhi Hai Teri Bhakti

hindi: बगलामुखी चालीसा जो गावे। शत्रु और मुकदमे में जीत पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Bagalamukhi Chalisa; wins over enemies and in legal battles
roman: Bagalamukhi Chalisa Jo Gaave, Shatru Aur Muqadme Mein Jeet Paave

hindi: जय जय बगलामुखी देवी। शत्रुओं की काली रेवी॥
english: Victory to Bagalamukhi Devi; dark destroyer of enemies
roman: Jai Jai Bagalamukhi Devi, Shatruon Ki Kali Revi
